word: H6188 - עָרֵל - ʻârêl - aw-rale' - Count uncircumcised

sections.paragraph:
Original: ערל

Transliteration: ‛ârêl

Phonetic: aw-rale'

BDB Definition:

  1. to remain uncircumcised, count uncircumcised, count as foreskin
    1. (Qal)
      1. to regard as uncircumcised
      2. to remain unharvested (figuratively)
    2. (Niphal) to be counted as uncircumcised

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1695

Part(s) of speech: Verb
